metadata.author: Quantum Weaver Gateway
metadata.description: A fusion of traditional Rider-Waite symbolism with quantum computing, neural networks, and pagan nature aesthetics
metadata.fileStructure: Complete 78-card deck merged from individual suit files

imagery.traditionalElements: Youth with bundle, dog, cliff edge, white rose
